svg.title: Mapping Validation Pipeline
svg.desc: Five-stage sequential validation for mapping definitions with fail-fast error handling

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1. Structure Validation
Validate JSON structure, required fields

div.style: color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. SQL Syntax Validation
Run EXPLAIN on each SQL query

div.style: color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3. Column Type Inference
Run LIMIT 0, inspect result schema

div.style: color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4. Schema Validation
Validate PK/FK references, edge nodes

div.style: color: rgb(1, 87, 155) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5. Type Mapping
Map Starburst types to Ryugraph types
